base_checkpoint_selection: highest unweighted manifest-v3 validation macro-F1 across the frozen four-epoch schedule
calibration: equal-source weighting across the three added field validation sources, with minimum temperature 1.0

fixed_thresholds.selection_source: hierarchical_validation_only_v8_candidate.json; thresholds themselves carry forward the preexisting trusted-crop product semantics from hierarchical_contract_v7.json

expected_crop_source_in_product: trusted crop-cycle metadata supplied by the API request
decision: temperature-scale logits using field validation only without sharpening below temperature 1.0
treat trusted crop-cycle metadata as authoritative for the supported crop
restrict the health decision to expected-crop healthy/disease plus the explicit invalid logit
use no visual crop-mismatch or additional confidence rejection
test_disclosure: The immutable test was observed for earlier candidates. This contract carries forward already frozen trusted-crop semantics and records only v3-manifest validation measurements from the new candidate. No v7 frozen-test example, label, logit, calibration value, or per-example failure was inspected before this file was frozen.
